title: Wax Candy Disco Dance Party!
excerpt:
Wax Candy is Toronto’s Friday night Disco party! Resident DJ Cyclist serves up the sweetest soulful and uplifting club classics and unearthed Disco gems how they are meant to heard, on vinyl and in one of the best sounding rooms in the Toronto. Thank God It’s Friday, let loose and get your dance on!


A warm welcome from Cynthia at the door and go find your friends on the dance floor.

Doors 10pm free b4 11pm $10 after - 19+

https://www.instagram.com/waxcandydisco/

https://www.facebook.com/torontodisco

title: Irresponsible Purchase w/ Chew bear & Jacob’s Ladder
excerpt:

Toronto we are playing @thepistonbar with @chewbearband and @jacobs_ladder_band

8pm $15 19+

title: JUICEBOX - Indie Sleaze-Britpop-Post Punk dance party!
excerpt:
Juicebox is an all vinyl monthly dance party on the fourth Saturday of every month. Running for 10 years, hosts DjBabs and DjTweed spin Indie Sleaze-Post Punk-New Wave-Synthpop-Britpop
You’ll hear:
The Strokes, David Bowie, Pulp, LCD Soundsystem, Bloc Party, Wet Leg, Cold Cave, The Human League, Joy Division, The Buzzcocks, ABC, Air, The Specials, Le Tigre, Belle & Sebastian, Supergrass, The Clash, Blur, Roxy Music, The Modern Lovers, Orange Juice, Gorillaz, Scissor Sisters, Broadcast, Sextile, Amyl & The Sniffers, Franz Ferdinand, Ladytron, The Drums, Robyn, The Charlatans, CSS, Goldfrapp, The Undertones, The Ramones, The Sounds, Super Furry Animals, St. Etienne, Tahiti 80, Weezer, MIA, Santogold, Garbage, Fatboy Slim, Belle & Sebastian, Wet Leg, Interpol, Madness, Phoenix, Arcade Fire, Happy Mondays, MGMT, The Stone Roses, The Cure, Kasabian, Cut Copy, The Gossip, Automatic, Peaches, The Rapture, Blondie, The Jam, The Dandy Warhols,The Jesus And Mary Chain, Arctic Monkeys, Yacht, Royksopp, Midnight Juggernauts, Tame Impala, The Killers, Viagra Boys, Stereolab, Jet, The Smiths, Sleaford Mods, Simple Minds, New Order and so on...

10pm 19+ $10 b4 11 - $15 after

https://www.instagram.com/juice_times_event

https://www.facebook.com/events/854611797407930/

title: It's All Good 90s video dance party!
excerpt:
On Saturday, July 18, join VJs, Mike Luke and General Eclectic, as they take you back to the '90s and celebrate 10 years of music video dance parties at The Piston, 937 Bloor Street West in Toronto, Ontario, Canada! From Biggie to Björk, Nirvana to No Doubt, Destiny's Child to Daft Punk, TLC to A.T.C.Q., Eminem to En Vogue, Mariah Carey to Massive Attack, Portishead to Pavement, Spice Girls to Stereolab & much more!

https://www.instagram.com/itsallgood90s/

https://www.facebook.com/events/1702493150891987/

10pm $15 19+

title: Fast Times 80s Dance Party!
excerpt:
Fast Times 80's dance party is a monthly dance party on the 2nd Saturday of every month!
DjBabs and DjTweed will be spinning your favourite new wave, synthpop, pop and guilty pleasure hits of the 1980’s!

https://www.instagram.com/juice_times_events/

Come dance like nobody's watching!

title: Freef'All Open Mic Farewell
excerpt:
Ready to make history? Join Freef'all for our final unforgettable night at the Piston before we move to the Pilot in July. Let’s celebrate the Piston, which we love, with a big send-off party! Bring your songs, bring your friends and let’s make some magic together. As always, admission is free. Doors and sign-ups open at 7pm, and spots are available on a first-come, first-served basis. Our feature will play a half-hour set at 7:30pm, then the open mic kicks off at 8pm. Each performer can play one or two songs. We’ll have amps, drums, keys, house instruments, and a sound engineer ready for you. Musicians of all styles and skill levels are welcome. Hope to see you there!

https://www.facebook.com/events/1349560007270299/

https://www.instagram.com/freefallsundays/

title: LOSE YOURSELF Y2K VIDEO DANCE PARTY!
excerpt:
On Saturday June 6th, join VJs Mikey Lukey and General Eclectic at The Piston, 937 Bloor Street West in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, to "Lose Yourself" to the sounds of the first decade of the millennium, the 2000's, The Naughty Noughties, Y2K baby!
From Akon to Alicia keys, Beyonce to Bloc Party, !!! (Chk Chk Chk) to Crazy Town, Daft Punk to Derulo, Fergie to Furtado, Gorillaz to Gwen Stefani, Metric to Maroon 5, Sean Kingston to Sean Paul, The Rapture to The Strokes, T-Pain to Timbaland, White Stripes to Lil Wayne & much more!

You only get one shot, do not miss your chance to blow
This opportunity comes on the first Saturday of every month!!!

https://www.instagram.com/loseyourselfy2k
